Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x97D4 "SPIRITOFTHESTONES-97D4" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Spirit of the Stones.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The entry point $97D4 is hit after entering the correct word on the manual protection step. Dumping at this point obviously removes this step.
